content.speakerText: How’s the budget holding up? Did you go over on marketing?
content.speakerTextCn: 预算情况如何？市场支出超支了吗？

options.text: We’re at 95% of the budget, and we’ve seen a 20% increase in sales.
I don’t know—I’m not in charge of the budget.
We spent way too much—no return at all.
The budget is fine, but we didn’t do any marketing.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了预算使用比例并强调了积极收益，符合场景中‘超支时需说明收益’的要求。选项2回避问题，选项3负面描述无收益，选项4与问题矛盾（已做市场支出），均不符合专业沟通规范。

content.speakerText: I noticed the travel expenses are higher than planned. Can you explain?
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到差旅费用比计划高，能解释一下吗？

options.text: Yes, we had to fly three team members to meet a key client—it led to a signed contract.
I forgot to submit the receipts.
The budget was too low, so we had no choice.
I’m not sure—I didn’t book the flights.

content.explanation: 正确答案既承认超支，又说明了商业收益，符合预算讨论中的关键沟通策略。选项2和4推卸责任，选项3仅抱怨预算不足，未提供价值论证，均缺乏专业性。

content.speakerText: Are we on track with the Q3 budget overall?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们整体Q3预算进展如何？

options.text: We’re at 72% spent, and all key projects are on schedule.
I think we’re doing okay, but I didn’t check the numbers.
We’re way over, but I’m sure it’ll balance out next quarter.
Budget? I only care about getting the work done.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体使用比例和项目进度，体现专业和负责任的态度。选项2缺乏数据支持，选项3预测未来平衡但无依据，选项4态度消极，均不符合职场预算沟通标准。
